- 50,000 wallets received airdrop — appeared legitimate
- All 50,000 airdrop wallets successfully transferred tokens (whitelisted)
- Regular buyers (4,891 wallets): added to blacklist on purchase
- Regular buyer sell success rate: 0%
- Airdrop recipients sold $3.2M worth (they were whitelisted insiders)
- Project appeared active but only insiders could exit
- Detected after community noticed all sell fails from non-airdrop wallets
- Pattern: 'airdrop honeypot' — whitelist hidden inside airdrop mechanism
